traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: See in dim light within 60 ft as if bright, and darkness as dim (grayscale).

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: Advantage on saves vs poison; resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.description: Proficiency with battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, warhammer.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Double proficiency on History checks about stonework.

traits.name: Tool Proficiency
traits.description: Proficiency with one set of artisan's tools (smith, brewer, or mason).

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Max HP increases by 1 per level.

traits.name: Dwarven Armor Training
traits.description: Proficiency with light and medium armor.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: See 60 ft in dim light as bright, darkness as dim.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: Proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: Advantage vs being charmed; magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: Meditate 4 hours for the benefit of an 8-hour rest.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.description: Know one wizard cantrip (Intelligence).

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: Longsword, shortsword, shortbow, longbow.

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.description: Learn one extra language.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: Longsword, shortsword, shortbow, longbow.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.description: Base walking speed 35 ft.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.description: Hide when lightly obscured by nature.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.description: Darkvision out to 120 ft.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: Disadvantage on attacks & Perception (sight) in sunlight.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.description: Dancing lights; faerie fire at 3rd, darkness at 5th (Charisma).

traits.name: Drow Weapon Training
traits.description: Rapier, shortsword, hand crossbow.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: Reroll a natural 1 on an attack, check, or save (use the new roll).

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: Advantage on saves vs being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: Move through the space of any creature larger than you.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: Hide when obscured by a creature at least one size larger.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.description: Advantage vs poison; resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.description: Learn one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Choose a dragon type; sets your breath and resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: Exhale energy in a line/cone; DC 8 + CON + prof, scales with level.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: Resistance to the damage type of your ancestry.

traits.description: See 60 ft in dim light as bright, darkness as dim.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: Advantage on INT, WIS, CHA saves against magic.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.description: Add double proficiency on History checks about magic items / devices.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.description: Construct tiny clockwork devices.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.description: Know the minor illusion cantrip (Intelligence).

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.description: Communicate simple ideas to Small or smaller beasts.

traits.description: See 60 ft in dim light as bright, darkness as dim.

traits.description: Advantage vs charm; magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Ability Choice
traits.description: +1 to two other abilities of your choice (set those manually).

traits.description: Proficiency in two skills of your choice.

traits.description: See 60 ft in dim light as bright, darkness as dim.

traits.name: Menacing
traits.description: Proficiency in Intimidation.

traits.description: See 60 ft in dim light as bright, darkness as dim.
